rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports or features.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model to define assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Use explicit boolean expressions for range checks in AGREE contracts.
Ensure type consistency between AGREE declarations and AADL data types.
Avoid referencing AADL properties directly in AGREE expressions without proper scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference valid component features or ports.
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-specific subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
Do not reference AADL timing properties like Period or Deadline directly in AGREE.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and their mapping to AGREE variables
Implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
